name: thermoid.com
message:
Founded in 1883 and headquartered in Dublin, Ohio. HBD Thermoid is a manufacturer of industrial rubber products, including air, automotive, aviation, bulk transfer, chemical, marine, water, welding and multipurpose industrial hoses, industrial ducting and conveyor belting.

Website: https://www.thermoid.com/

Revenue : $183.2M

Address: 5200 Pl Upper Metro Ste 110, Dublin, Ohio, 43017, United States

Phone Number: (614) 526-7000
